{
  "rules": [
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_certificate_source",
      "operator": "in",
      "value": ["ASTA", "KEMA"],
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Manufacturer shall provide ASTA or KEMA type test certificates for the switchgear assemblies demonstrating compliance with IEC 62271-200."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_rated_voltage",
      "operator": "exists",
      "value": null,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Type test reports shall cover rated voltage, short circuit withstand, temperature rise, internal arc, and dielectric tests."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_short_circuit_withstand",
      "operator": "exists",
      "value": null,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Type test reports shall cover rated voltage, short circuit withstand, temperature rise, internal arc, and dielectric tests."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_temperature_rise",
      "operator": "exists",
      "value": null,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Type test reports shall cover rated voltage, short circuit withstand, temperature rise, internal arc, and dielectric tests."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_internal_arc",
      "operator": "exists",
      "value": null,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Type test reports shall cover rated voltage, short circuit withstand, temperature rise, internal arc, and dielectric tests."
    },
    {
      "parameter": "swgr.type_test_dielectric",
      "operator": "exists",
      "value": null,
      "unit": null,
      "condition": null,
      "quote": "Type test reports shall cover rated voltage, short circuit withstand, temperature rise, internal arc, and dielectric tests."
    }
  ]
}
